notes: Expanded monthly issue deck. 60 government issues and 60 opposition/third-party issues. Not imported to Mongo yet.

deckRules.selection: Backend rotates through active role-allowed issues per party, so each party sees every issue in its role pool before repeats.

issueItems.title: Teacher recruitment irregularity allegations
issueItems.description: Applicants accuse local officials and party-linked brokers of manipulating teacher recruitment lists.

options.text: Suspend the implicated officials, publish the full merit list online, and open a fresh review with outside examiners.
Deploy emergency verification camps in all districts to fast-track clean appointments and show visible progress.
Constitute a three-member inquiry panel, freeze pending appointments, and await its report before acting.

risk.badOutcome: The committee is mocked as a stalling tactic.

options.text: Defend the recruitment process as rule-bound and call the allegations a pre-election smear campaign.

issueItems.title: Flood relief leakage complaints
issueItems.description: Villagers say relief packets are being diverted through local middlemen.

options.text: Audit every relief packet disbursed, name the middlemen publicly, and hand the cases to the district magistrate.
Dispatch a fresh direct supply through block officers, bypassing the contractors accused of diversion.
Form a relief monitoring committee, publish a helpline number, and allow complaints for 30 days.

risk.badOutcome: The committee is mocked as a stalling tactic.

options.text: Attribute leakage reports to opposition mischief and defend the existing distribution mechanism publicly.

issueItems.title: Local ruling party leader accused of extortion
issueItems.description: Business owners privately complain that a district strongman is collecting illegal payments.

options.text: Suspend the accused district leader immediately and issue a written public statement on zero tolerance.

risk.badOutcome: A video of intimidation goes viral.

options.text: Quietly compensate the affected businesses and redeploy the leader to a non-contact administrative post.

risk.badOutcome: A video of intimidation goes viral.

options.text: Ask the district president to investigate internally; suspend public comment pending findings.

risk.badOutcome: The committee is mocked as a stalling tactic.

options.text: Stand by the accused, call the charges politically motivated, and rally local cadre around him.

risk.badOutcome: A video of intimidation goes viral.

issueItems.title: District hospital medicine shortage
issueItems.description: A district hospital reports medicine shortages after supplier payment delays.

options.text: Order an immediate supply audit, publish the shortfall data, and hold the procurement officer accountable.

risk.badOutcome: A patient death becomes a media story.

options.text: Release emergency funds for medicines and equipment within 48 hours with public delivery tracking.

risk.badOutcome: A patient death becomes a media story.

options.text: Announce a health task force and schedule a ministerial district visit within two weeks.

risk.badOutcome: The committee is mocked as a stalling tactic.

options.text: Attribute the shortage to central supply delays and deny any local procurement mismanagement.

risk.badOutcome: A patient death becomes a media story.

issueItems.title: Ration shop diversion complaints
issueItems.description: Families allege ration dealers are diverting grain before festivals.

options.text: Freeze the dealer's licence, publish the diverted grain quantity, and open a direct-beneficiary helpdesk.
Dispatch double the usual stock before the next festival and run door-to-door beneficiary verification.
Issue a formal show-cause notice to the dealer and set a 30-day compliance deadline.

risk.badOutcome: The committee is mocked as a stalling tactic.

options.text: Dismiss reports as exaggerated and point to overall statewide distribution figures as proof of health.

issueItems.title: Primary school absenteeism rises

options.text: Launch surprise cluster inspections, dock absent teachers' pay, and publish block-level attendance data.

risk.badOutcome: Teacher unions accuse government of scapegoating.

options.text: Hire community attendance monitors for each school and pre-distribute a term's mid-day meal supply.

risk.badOutcome: Teacher unions accuse government of scapegoating.

options.text: Direct district inspectors to file monthly reports and convene a departmental review next quarter.

risk.badOutcome: The committee is mocked as a stalling tactic.

options.text: Blame the opposition-aligned teachers' union for inflating absence figures ahead of elections.

risk.badOutcome: Teacher unions accuse government of scapegoating.

issueItems.title: Rural road contract delays

options.text: Cancel the defaulting contractor's order, invoke penalty clauses in the agreement, and re-tender within 30 days.

delayedEffects.commentary: Road work resumes in visible patches.

risk.badOutcome: The committee is mocked as a stalling tactic.
